Chai and bun maskaa on top 🔝🔝","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMe-Yatp6hoiCoMTKhvCdN8t4z7_QfqZpsIUbn8&fid=0x0:0xbb57b61395953eb3"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Shubham Lokhande","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7TGaQN3LuZE2qMHs01J7jqRiH3Qgi-1M2H_Hfra461EdXKItk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Very old and famous bakery. I came here to see if it’s worth trying the products here.

Took Veg fortune cookie and was okay, it’s fortune is the one people seeks, and I got “Good humour is actually goodness and wise”.  Note: Non veg fortune cookie is also there so please check before buying. (Rs 25 each)

Also took mava cake and that one was nice. (Rs 40 each)

Service is quite ok, as in mornings there is no sitting option and there are only one person serving, so there was a small line.

Ambience is not the role here, just old buildings vibe and not so good to say about it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPxos62HYp_lrSenDcPkTRkhHzX-bo5KDEUjTYH&fid=0x0:0xbb57b61395953eb3"],"When":"2024-10-6"},{"Name":"Sushant Tanawde","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWce5DpgyzriFDJQysFQj8OTOJfMtcZSjcBplxyutCbpEz2fW8V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Yazdani Bakery, located in Colaba, Fort, is one of Mumbai's iconic old-school Parsi bakeries. It has been a beloved spot for both locals and tourists, largely for its nostalgic charm, but your experience highlights how the hype can sometimes overshadow the reality.

// Positives -

Old-School Ambiance: The bakery's vintage wooden roof, aged structure, and old-world vibe certainly transport you to another era. It’s like stepping into a piece of history, where time seems to have paused.

// Negatives

1. Limited Variety: It’s disappointing to find that they had a very limited selection of products during your visit. Given the bakery's reputation, it’s reasonable to expect a fuller menu, so this could be a letdown for many visitors.

2. No Digital Payment: The lack of a GPay facility (cash-only payments) can indeed be frustrating, especially in a time when most places accept digital payments. This adds inconvenience, particularly if you’re not carrying cash.

3. Hygiene Issues:The sight of mice freely roaming around is a serious concern. Hygiene is crucial, especially in a food establishment, and this issue can definitely tarnish the experience, making you question the overall cleanliness and food safety.

4. Customer Service: The person at the counter being slow and rude is another red flag. Good customer service is key to any establishment, and long wait times combined with poor attitudes can really spoil the visit.

5. Food Quality: Trying the mawa cake and fortune cookies—both of which are quite popular. It’s disappointing that the mawa cake didn’t live up to the hype, though the fortune cookies seemed to fare better.

//Overall Review -
Yazdani Bakery is a spot that thrives on its historic value and vintage charm, but your experience suggests that the quality of service and the range of offerings might not meet the expectations that social media hype creates. Hygiene issues, the lack of payment options, and subpar customer service could overshadow the nostalgic ambiance. For someone visiting with high hopes, this could result in a disappointing experience, especially if they are expecting more from such an iconic place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPqicUWfAgtTDxNqvArx1SZt8xMGoN1Tnu-zACr&fid=0x0:0xbb57b61395953eb3"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Harry Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUUIRlJFiyTohvsKU6e8jvKLkp-nAFwZzg9oINxzmcPPdUvpbe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Old and classic bakery, though the sit in section was closed when we were there. We got the famous Bun and Almond Cake for 100rp. Good but not that good. Tourist-focused","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO11_2fBm4PLsIpNDXFFO8k33HA3W9UbDcpxJrW&fid=0x0:0xbb57b61395953eb3"],"When":"2024-12-28"},{"Name":"Adit Wilankar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_lgq3gXDI52uNFoyfFdDzifH0pFRdzS4jiskgteiF9s593cG1XA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I went on Sunday, 11 AM to be approx, the bakery was still being set-up so didn't get the full experience. Almost 100 years old, this take-out bakery has been selling bun maska to generations. Known for its old charm baking techniques, the walls are covered with unique retro posters and advertisements from yesteryears. You'll be instantly transported to 90s era where hygiene wasn't a big thing and people enjoy simple things.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOtS-8-lh1o8xU38ux9CvFkDYaj3WtO5bVsdNdY&fid=0x0:0xbb57b61395953eb3"],"When":"2024-7-29"},{"Name":"Abhishek Khamari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1mAWboNOFEf3xZpQ2X8LFHk_7Ivg-zVJTcU9lzchLz3OudE5mtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"With irresistible cakes with a perfect balance of flavor and creativity. [{"Name":"Shrikant Mayekar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJv6d1-3YYj3wckqmS4jzpswy-4QM4NX4yQ1SfyUcTzL0a_1LrCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best plum cake I have ever had is at Vienna bakery. Do visit this place if you are near Vakola or Santacruz East area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Jacob","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDJf-EBs9eMiikspD_NYucAOhV7Iz_HsQPmOeFLyyTdAm3aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are looking for some amazing plum cakes, this is the place in Mumbai.
While you are there you can also try some other delicacies. The Rich Plum and Banana cake are my personal favourites.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K. F.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPWiM3byfqxpRyyeT4Q1BjQ0ub577ZUjlisomAaaNvODv5Ovoc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vienna Bakery is a well known bakery in these parts of Mumbai. It offers a delightful array of pastries, cakes, and snacks.

With a history dating back to 1959, this bakery has been a local favorite for generations. Beyond its famous plum cake, their menu features a wide selection of vegetarian and non-vegetarian options, including crispy potato wafers and  patties.

While it can get busy, especially on weekends and evenings, the consistent quality make it well worth a visit.

Staff not really welcoming, working like machines. There is a table available to eat but it's not advisable due to the limited space.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Siddhant K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKShZEg69Yt6D_QMl99mgoKo-vWIrT2YvjSkzeSiOPQyeSiU_r8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"♥️ You can not go wrong after coming to Vienna Bakery,
It gives you the old Mumbai vibe with a hint of new gen facade. Their products are simply amazing especially the Pattice, Puffs and Croissants. Cream donuts are yummy.
Their staff is so well behaved and quick that you won't wait here for more than 10 minutes for your purchase.
They have a small set-up standing table to quickly eat and leave. I love Vienna and it's vibe.

Pineapple Roll is delicious.
Food quality is amazing and I hope they never compromise in their quality.

Puffs and pastries are at a very pocket friendly price. A hungry person can have a stomach full meal at maximum 220rs, Including a brownie.

Keep up the good work Vienna. ♥️♥️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isha Kashyap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2q3mYr1FlYe7m_c8L0eZFzhqlhwmd18WNBRnwayx4AMKuorkFPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Plum Cake for me feels like all of festive cheer in a loaf of cake. As someone who's had a ridiculous quantity, variety & versions of plum cake, I must say, Team Vienna makes the most magical plum cake in all of Mumbai. Getting some plum cake from a shop , is one thing, but maybe your favorite catholic aunt/ neighbour sending you homemade cake with all the goodness baked into it , is third base stuff. And THAT, is literally what Vienna Bakery's plum cake tastes like. Incase you're someone like me, who wants to feel all the jolliness of Christmas in a plum cake..just have the plum cake from Vienna. And that reminds me, I'm going to visit them very, VERY soon again. BIG HUG  :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rohit Radhakrishnan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3XAPu4rbLN3DIj9B8tomIIcRfWwRNgArNMfZ_plsj1l8Txppi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best bakeries in and around Kalina, Vakola or Santacruz East to be precise.
The vanilla/cream donut is must try!!!
You also get chocolate donuts.
Plum or Rum cakes are also too good.
The pastries and puffs especially the chicken is heavy and yummy.
Ensure you go early to the Bakery as they get sold quick and since they only provide fresh food you will have to wait until next day or Order the food item you want and collect it next day whenever you want too.
There is no place to sit and eat so you can take out.
The staffs are friendly and helpful.

( The Ones in pic are my personal fav )","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNPPk67IXcH2MF_f2iUwissRsrRA0NFnzuZuKi0&fid=0x0:0xd614dba0c960e593"],"When":"2023-12-28"},{"Name":"DISHA SHETTY","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhsmsRt8Oa-5TUDislngcsYj_RJM74wtJzLeGpE8MipkpFK-yLUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have the best plum cakes ever and I don’t think the taste has changed from past 30 years…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tejas Kurne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJQa0OtzxkfAPmL-Oemt_ZFiPHXKz6kOIPsD4Fcr3L5Qc4_nM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My all time favourite bakery has finally opened. Was dying to eat their all products and did it so. Specially was wanting to eat their amazing mouth watering Chicken Patties. Their Plum cake I've been eating it since my childhood, from then till now nothing has changed(rather than price 😜) I get the same taste, flavor and quality specially. This bakery is just simply awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNbhfiEja_qZpnHrMSDjyJ6ErhQ8raK_cdEuPQQ&fid=0x0:0xd614dba0c960e593"],"When":"2020-10-30"}]

They are very famous for their mava cakes which get over pretty early.
I used to be a big fan of this eatery, but my recent visit changed my perspective completely. Am not sure if the management has changed but here are few of the changes I noticed:

1. Earlier it was order first and pay afterwards,  but now you have to pay first and hand over the coupon and its self service. This change is acceptable.

2. I visited around 2.20pm on Sat afternoon, and it was almost full, so footfall is not a problem.

3. The staff is very very less as self service,  also the tables are cleaned very late.

4. The most disappointing point was that they have stopped using cutlery. Everything is served in disposable aluminum plates and paper cups.

5. Even for tea, its pre made, and milk is always on gas, after order they just pour the premade tea and hot milk, i remember earlier they used to actually make it fresh.

6. The omlette texture and size has also changed, it isn't the same like before.

The service has become poor which affects the overall customer satisfaction.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP_jAXEWYxpkCCVapOwgzONU0e61SZkKo7KjheQ&fid=0x0:0x2fc5b8983c299993"],"When":"2024-8-11"}]

Had a variety of fresh pastries - some were huge 😄 Cosy spot to have chat and snack.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMxpMvSKcE65M8hAphI0Ioimkog6NKZCOglfrQs&fid=0x0:0x5f6f1c64ce46a429"],"When":"2024-1-23"},{"Name":"sambhav gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVp0qZNGwK0qWBPtUkcmPFbnw24ZpnYRNy0MDccth9gy42PRhFV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wanted to take a moment to express my sincere appreciation for the incredible dining experience I had at your restaurant. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted warmly and felt welcomed. The ambiance was inviting and set the perfect tone for what turned out to be an unforgettable meal.

Let me start by saying that the food was absolutely outstanding. Each dish was a masterpiece of flavors and textures, meticulously prepared and presented with care. The freshness of the ingredients shone through in every bite, and it was evident that a great deal of thought and skill went into crafting each dish.

The appetizers were a delightful introduction to the meal, with flavors that teased the palate and left me eager for more. The main course was nothing short of phenomenal. Every bite was a revelation, with layers of flavor that danced on my taste buds. Whether it was the perfectly cooked steak, the succulent seafood, or the flavorful vegetarian options, each dish was a testament to the culinary expertise of your kitchen staff.

And let's not forget about dessert! Just when I thought the meal couldn't get any better, I was treated to an array of sweet delights that left me in awe. The desserts were not only visually stunning but also incredibly delicious, providing the perfect ending to an already unforgettable dining experience.

In addition to the exceptional food, I also want to commend the outstanding service. The staff was attentive, knowledgeable, and went above and beyond to ensure that my dining experience was nothing short of perfect. From recommendations on the menu to ensuring that my water glass was never empty, every interaction with the staff was a delight.

Overall, my experience  was nothing short of amazing. I left feeling not only satisfied but also inspired by the culinary artistry and passion that was evident in every aspect of the dining experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sdmaco123456","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfZgMDu2ljId7TddwHe3sO9jHhQrcnPhXLzqwvDuHQpgIh7cvN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was good and the price was reasonable as it is inside JW Marriott. If the same shop is located then this set up will be fine. But inside Marriott it should have its class.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPte1yBhX9qg6M4G3hs62PvSyfQ-ntz0LlN4SYj&fid=0x0:0x5f6f1c64ce46a429"],"When":"2020-10-13"}]

You must surely visit this place. Good for groups. Those who love chocolate and bakery products then this place belongs to your bucket list.❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMWUJg1fYiAmo6G-ZBYB4L_hlp87oWp6a37wMgw&fid=0x0:0xc4d710621fa20890"],"When":"2018-6-9"},{"Name":"Savio Dcunha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvgspd4GeI7RCkv8JchOen0WdMdUL0LS2PUJxImwLKzl11FTze0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Elementaria Cafe and Dessert Bar is located  exactly opposite the Phoenix Tower and is small yet conveniently comfortable bakery and dessert bar. Totally drool worthy sight to see Pastries, cupcakes, cookies, croissant on the display. For all you chocolate lovers who are looking for a quick fix whilst in Lower Parel head to Elementaria which is bang opposite Lower Parel.

Value for money, variety, cafe with privacy, friendly staff are some of this Cafe & Dessert Bar's highlight. Special mention to the staff of this place who are super co-operative.

What you should try here is the the season special Cheesecake Popsicle, 48 layer Chocolate Cake, Super Thick Shakes, Croissant and a variety of Cupcakes (recommend to check with the staff).

24 layer pastry-(Recommended) it’s an extremely delicious pastry with super soft layers of chocolaty cake and accompanied with icecream and chocolate sauce.

Minty Popsicle Cheesecake - The Christmas special range of desserts..!! The warmth of the cheesecake and the freshness of Mint topped with edible color pops.!!.

Caramel Sea Salt Milkshake, AK 47 Milkshake, Eli Jumbo (A super loaded dessert with ICe Cream, Chocolate Cake, Fresh Cream, Chocolate poppers, Wafer Sticks, Strawberry Jelly - Caution this is death by sweetness and for a serving for 2 people)

Definitely a place in my bookmark and to visit again list..!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM9hkF4CP5jM2LMg58aCI5lfU1UFy2vu61B2YPG&fid=0x0:0xc4d710621fa20890"],"When":"2019-1-6"},{"Name":"Sahil 786","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe4pCsyASq7si4whb8iWXT6VD4T4XOshbf2cAa7lqdN9HOjLp8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This cafe is a heaven for dessert lovers. A must try place Guys....🤟👌😋😋😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNQvBCK6OXP8DweT11mRuYarRhjwVsrX4tNutY6&fid=0x0:0xc4d710621fa20890"],"When":"2021-2-7"}]

No WiFi available","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNmxYl4zrPFF_BNuLn5WVp7moQhZpbANiFBYH8N&fid=0x0:0x72648c183df0b56"],"When":"2023-5-1"},{"Name":"Rinshana Fathima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmIwlvO5TkzTQtD2NMAVV6NA5vpu3zrosjq0kcGus3IGe8hOndBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Theobroma was such a joyful find in Bombay. The pastries are just sinful! The brownies, red velvet cake, banoffee pie, lemon tart, cheesecake, croissants and sandwiches, the list goes on and on, everything is just soo good to eat. The pastries are priced decently and are full of goodness. The warm brownie is the perfect pairing for a cup of Americano. The gooey chocolatey-ness of the brownie is wonderful and you really do get that kick of chocolate from that. The red velvet cake was indeed the best we had. The cake was moist and well-soaked, and the frosting had the perfect tanginess that we have been looking for. Red velvet cake was the synonym for perfection! The croissant was flaky, buttery and loaded with richness and goodness. The roasted chicken mustard sandwich was the perfect breakfast bite. The banoffee pie was all that it was meant to be. The New York cheesecake was the only thing that was falling behind a little. But overall, a great place for a guilty pleasure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPKMXfWIP5oZ612tAzkelz3rkF6jzJC_gtODjJ4&fid=0x0:0x72648c183df0b56"],"When":"2022-11-17"}]

The service is good although they sometimes get flustered when there are multiple customers.

Food: There are a wide variety of bakery products including cakes, pastries, breads, cookies, puffs, tea time bakes. They are mostly well prepared and cost friendly. The Cream Roll needs more cream as the bottom of the roll is just biscuit and no cream.

Recommendations: Try their Apple Pie (add vanilla ice cream to enhance the flavours) it is full of flavours and well made. The Khari and Butter are great bites with tea and coffee. The Pista Cookies are their highlight! They are soft and full of dry fruits and fresh!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM7QhlQNVOOJd7nlytgz2jAsO70iO_zykyHCxol&fid=0x0:0x9dd56975cbda306e"],"When":"2024-8-10"},{"Name":"Varsha Bagadia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRqvQEEnyVrMNyM5dQG9fnt_XafqWl9VZEfeL9YYuAnADIJq2z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Chanced upon this place while walking through the lanes of Fort area. They had many things on display but we chose to order Veg puff to eat (it was ok) and Dilkhush to go (didn't like it).

The person behind the counter was rude and kept asking us to repeat our order (how can anyone not get two things right?). Not the kind of treatment one would expect from a regular bakery. Doubt I'll go back here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipODMAVCXI68-fmvBWPmRrkGOmh6VySrtyaJsYJ2&fid=0x0:0x9dd56975cbda306e"],"When":"2023-3-30"},{"Name":"Sonam Pote","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMeT7vkVmSm69j8dqH2bjyolvCgnEJEtqMYG_uKqc8woa3_ffvvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Edward Bakery, nestled in the heart of Fort on Perin Nariman Street, Borabazar Precinct, is a charming old-world gem that has been serving its patrons for an impressive 90 years. This historic bakery is a must-visit if you're in the Ballard Estate area.

Food Quality:
Edward Bakery is renowned for its wide range of freshly baked goods, all prepared in-house with great care and attention to detail. The quality of their products is exceptional, with everything tasting fresh and flavorful. The highlight of their menu is the Puffs, which are a must-try. These are flaky, buttery, and filled with deliciousness—truly one of the best puffs you'll find in Mumbai.

Ambience & Service:
The bakery exudes an old-world charm with its classic interiors, reminding you of the rich heritage and history it carries. The staff are friendly and efficient, ensuring you have a pleasant experience whether you're picking up a quick snack or browsing through their selection.

Overall Experience:
Edward Bakery is more than just a place to grab a bite—it's a slice of Mumbai's culinary history. Whether you're in the mood for their famous puffs, freshly baked bread, or a variety of other bakery items, you won't be disappointed. The consistent quality and freshness of their offerings make it a beloved spot for both locals and visitors alike.

If you're in Fort, make sure to stop by Edward Bakery for a taste of tradition and some truly delicious treats!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sridhar Chigurupati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcm0y_HqeIwvtkVrQgtT9IvoYR4DFfoGxN5sWdlqc2rI-ozkt1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good varieties of breads, cookies and other bakery items at pretty reasonable rates. Their menu boasts veg options like classic cake toasts, mouthwatering veg rolls, and show-stopping giant brun bread. Strategically located in Worli, City Bakery is easily accessible. Upon entering, the scent of freshly baked goods sets the tone for a memorable experience. Standouts include mango danish, croissants, chocolate chip cake, and soft, fresh bread. City Bakery's commitment to quality and taste shines through. Passionate staff provide helpful guidance. City Bakery is an absolute delight for anyone with a fondness for baked goods! This charming bakery, conveniently located in Worli, stole our hearts with its delectable treats and excellent service.

One of the best things about City Bakery is its strategic location. It's easily accessible, and the added bonus of ample parking just outside the bakery made our visit hassle-free. Upon entering, we were greeted with the delightful aroma of freshly baked goods, setting the perfect tone for our experience.

We decided to try the cake toasts, and they turned out to be an absolute treat! Light, fluffy, and packed with flavor, they paired perfectly with our evening tea at home. It was a joy to indulge in such scrumptious delights, making our tea-time truly special.

The veg rolls at City Bakery are now a firm favorite for us. The bread used in these rolls was incredibly soft and fresh, making each bite a delightful experience. The combination of the flavorful fillings with the soft bread was nothing short of heavenly.

However, the showstopper for us was the giant brun bread, also known as kadak pav. It was truly a sight to behold! We were amazed by the size of this family-sized loaf, and it tasted even better than it looked. The crust was perfectly crispy, and the inside was soft and fluffy. Our family enjoyed every single slice, and we couldn't resist sharing our find with friends and neighbors.

The staff at City Bakery were friendly and helpful, making our visit even more pleasant. Their passion for baking was evident, and they happily guided us through their offerings, adding a personal touch to our experience.

In conclusion, City Bakery is a hidden gem for baked goods enthusiasts. With its amazing location, delectable cake toasts, mouthwatering veg rolls, and the unforgettable giant brun bread, it has won us over as loyal customers. If you're looking for a bakery that delivers on taste and quality, look no further. City Bakery is a must-visit, and we can't wait to explore more of their delightful creations in the future!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipM8gZ5EyKEkRrHIUB-DovNkRbNSIlXRseghTOMn&fid=0x0:0x6cc1b381e769290e"],"When":"2023-7-23"}]

Prices are very reasonable for the food that they serve you. Their chai and bun maska are a must try. Something very interesting about this place is that they have no menu rather, they write whatever is available on a blackboard with coloured chalks which I think is very unique and fancy!

If you're around fort area, drop in a for a quick Irani chai and some cookies or buns","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOGmGA8ZwiFI-d6M9diCNVqZeB-zVwBZF6w16Q&fid=0x0:0x9a42383d19d0fc44"],"When":"2019-12-25"},{"Name":"Kailesh Ved","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfpaA8wHrjjWTxps73mk4HtgbYI_RTjfM0t_FzIoWKORDwh8Ao=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This bakery evokes a sense of nostalgia. At specific times, they offer freshly baked Mumbai Ladi Pav, an essential bread in Mumbai's culinary landscape. Ladi pav, a distinctive bread or Mumbai Bun, serves as the foundation for vada pav, an Indian burger variation, and pav bhaji, a renowned Mumbai street food.

While numerous bakeries sell these breads, each establishment possesses unique qualities. I have been a loyal customer of this bakery for an extended period.

Around 4 pm, a substantial queue forms. The breads are exceptionally soft and possess a distinctive flavor.

In addition to the pav, this bakery boasts an impressive selection of cakes, bread rusks, toasted bread, the signature butter khari, and more.

I highly recommend adding a packet of jeera butter to your purchase during your visit. The products are of excellent quality and represent great value for money.

The staff provides exceptional service, demonstrating remarkable efficiency and responsiveness. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Penyiar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWRq3GkSvrGcWU73RI1UU2cs_vFJsflKryb6Ge7xIhuE3nLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We went to C.O.O. at Nepean Sea Rd on 29 Oct 2024, and we actually go there several times a year.

We write today because our Granola purchase turned out to have a slightly opened aluminium foil 'safety' cover beneath the lid, opened just big enough for someone to be able to get a few pieces onto their hand. Some of its contents may have been poured out, but the other Granola jar seemed to be untouched.

We tried to call the store but it was past their operational hours. Then we recalled the attitude of the staff; the way they 'know' that their products are better than some other bakeries. Here are some examples of their disregard for customer service.

Example 1: We were excited to see Truffle Mushroom Quiche on the wall menu and we discussed what others items to buy while standing in front of the Cashier. Only AFTER we talked about that menu and asked to buy our choices, the Cashier eventually said, "Oh, those items are for order only, by phone first." They didn't bother to warn us that the menu behind the Cashier is actually for online orders only. (You like what you see? Go home, then order by phone/online.)

Example 2: After the food menu snafu, we tried to soothe our disappointment by ordering a cold coffee/mocha drink from the menu. Again, only AFTER we discussed what drink to buy and we pointed to our choices, did one of the staff (this time not the Cashier) told us that no cold drinks are available. My wife and I both responded: "But it's on the menu! Why put it on the menu?" That same staff just reiterated what he said earlier.

Yes this was all annoying: the smug staff, the lying menu and tonight the semi opened aluminium cover on our otherwise yummy Granola. Unfortunately I cannot upload the photo. I suspect that their attitude was based on us just buying less than 10 items a few days before Diwali: a loaf of multigrain bread, two different Granola jars, a Cafe Latte, a Roasted Garlic Hummus, a Mascarpone Creme Eclair, and one Lemon Drop Teacake.

Remember... big Mumbai companies hand out hampers supplied by C.O.O. (we know because we got one once), hence the ignorance towards better service for individual customers.

Now that I've read other customers' reviews on Google, I find that the staff's attitude at the Nepean Sea Road branch of C.O.O. is typically disappointing despite the agreeable food. If you ever go there, make sure to ASK first before ordering from the menu, and please unscrew the lids of the Granola jars to make sure they have not been compromised.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Hungry Heart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPSqCPa0tV0C4TKWReH4NkRfPdX8Q8o1SASNuNEfYqtUFMZ3Zp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hello Foodies.

📌Overall this place is a paradise for dessert lovers and has a wide range of fresh tempting desserts. Go for it and you will fall in love with every dessert here.
